channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Coinbase, Bybit said to be working together on tokenization, custody and distribution of U.S. stocks
item.description: The talks do not involve any sort of stake acquisition or similar deal to enter the U.S., as was reported elsewhere last month.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE price plummets 22.9% over weekend
item.description: Bitcoin (BTC) price dropped 2.5% and BNB Token (BNB) fell 2.3% from Friday.

item.title: Strategy Adds $2.5 Billion in Bitcoin as STRC Dividend Traders Drive Largest Buy Since 2024
item.description: Strategy reported its largest purchase in over 16 months, scooping up $2.54 billion in Bitcoin last week alongside STRC’s ex-dividend date.

item.title: Bitmine buys 101,627 ether worth over $230 million, its largest weekly haul of 2026
item.description: The Ethereum treasury firm is nearing 5 million ETH holdings as it increased its accumulation pace over the past weeks.

item.title: Morning Minute: DeFi's Future in Question After $292M KelpDAO Exploit
item.description: DeFi TVL fell by $13B after the KelpDAO exploit, and now the Vercel CEO is saying "highly sophisticated" actors used AI for its exploit.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor's Strategy officially surpasses BlackRock's BTC holdings. Strategy: 815,061 BTC BlackRock: 802,823 BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5qZW5aMnY3M1E0MzRicFN3OFFOODF4UUo3WC0tLV83YWpxRDlGaVo3YzVycmdpNlZWSXY0LURKc3h0LWt0ZmcxN3lMOHJEZkJZcDNwdmwyMUtXbXltVFgycUZBNjlYWVE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor's S…

item.title: Strategy buys 34,164 Bitcoin for $2.5B, holdings top 800,000 BTC
item.description: Strategy bought 34,164 Bitcoin for $2.54 billion last week, marking its third-largest BTC purchase on record.

item.title: Bitcoin metrics line up bull signals with $78K the BTC price level to beat
item.description: With $75,000 possibly the new floor, Bitcoin is giving hints that a BTC price breakout is about to begin, based on two classic technical indicators.

item.title: Strategy buys 34,164 bitcoin for $2.54 billion, third-largest purchase on record
item.description: Last week's purchases were funded by sales of the companies perpetual preferred stock, STRC and common stock.

item.title: Coinbase rolls out UK crypto-backed loans as FCA shapes rules
item.description: Coinbase launched USDC loans for UK users backed by BTC, ETH and cbETH, expanding its borrowing product as Britain moves toward a crypto regulatory regime.

item.title: Strategy has acquired 34,164 BTC for ~$2.54 billion at ~$74,395 per bitcoin and has achieved BTC Yield of 9.5% YTD 2026. As of 4/19/2026, we hodl 815,061 $BTC acquired for ~$61.56 billion at ~$75,527 per bitcoin. $MSTR $STRC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5NT2FpakNWZG9Qd0taMXhoTG1Dc2t1M2h4WVVvSmFEZGM3NTBpWHdCWlZJRXJfS09nazVpanZSQnlYcVRvNUxyS2I1OVgtM3duclZfREVMQXdzYk0?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy has acquired 34,164 BTC for ~$2.54…

item.title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire ends, Tesla earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting April 20.

item.title: LayerZero Pins $292M KelpDAO Bridge Hack on North Korea’s Lazarus Group
item.description: Attackers forged a cross-chain message, came within minutes of a second drain, and wiped their tracks on the way out.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs ow over a $1b in YTD flows (having dug out of the outflow hole and then some). Next thing to watch is the cumulative lifetime net flows (MOST IMP and HARDEST NUMBER). This number peaked at $62.8b, curr $58b so about $5b away from hittin - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1LUzBkaEtvbkRPM3ZvVVhGVWxyUGxlTWdTWUN6VEtzdDNGUVJHZkdSdnk5cjE3cEdvT2pSRWNYSFhlSVUyR1pwd0IwZVp0M3ZidXZKM3BFQzExczRGcDJndFdJWlQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin ETFs ow over a $1b in Y…

item.title: Nearly $1 billion in bitcoin ETF inflows power bull case as Kelp hack fuels DeFi jitters
item.description: What you need to know for April 20, 2026

item.title: Crypto fund inflows hit $1.4B in second-strongest week since January
item.description: Crypto investment products recorded $1.4 billion in inflows last week as Bitcoin almost touched $78,000, with assets under management rising to $154.8 billion.

item.title: Trying to help your friend complete EXP Real-User Verification, but don’t want to explain it step by step every time? Here’s the official tutorial: SoSoValue 101 Ep.01 — How to complete EXP Real-User Verification This guide walks through: • how to unlock 15% - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5qZmdKeUxiOUlmTkpXa1gyQjBDN3NwdWdSWGlnUnk2N3FtbEtZTWkzdDdXSmRuWUJhT3hHdFdIUWhRNjhMTmhQRHFVamtFLUR1dFRTdkVfcHdBdHJ1MGROVnhPYVBQbVk?oc=5" target="_blank">Trying to help your friend …

item.title: ‘Highly Sophisticated,’ AI-Powered Hackers Behind Vercel Breach: CEO
item.description: The security incident compromised some customer credentials of the cloud platform, which is used by many crypto frontends to host their UI.

item.title: Bitcoin drops from recent highs as traders watch CME gap, DeFi hack fallout
item.description: Bitcoin pulled back after Friday’s surge as traders considered a CME futures gap, a DeFi exploit rattled altcoins and macro pressures weighed on sentiment.

item.title: LayerZero says Kelp setup enabled exploit, as Aave loss questions mount
item.description: LayerZero said that Kelp’s DVN setup allowed the $290 million exploit, as investors questioned which protocol would step up to cover the shortfall.

item.title: How Mastercard plans to settle card payments with stablecoins
item.description: Mastercard is testing stablecoin settlement with SoFiUSD to speed up card transaction clearing and help bridge traditional finance and blockchain.

item.title: Coinbase Tests AI Agents Modeled on ‘Legendary’ Former Execs
item.description: The exchange is trialing AI agents that replicate the decision-making styles of co-founder Fred Ehrsam and former CTO Balaji Srinivasan.

item.title: Bitcoin is rallying as flagship conference approaches, data shows the gains rarely last
item.description: After a 50% slide and partial recovery for bitcoin, traders are watching whether the Las Vegas event marks another short-term top for bitcoin.

item.title: BTC price due new highs: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin saw a green weekly close despite renewed US-Iran war momentum, and a trader forecast that BTC price action would beat last week's local highs.

item.title: Here's how bitcoin's $7.9 billion April options expiry impact prices
item.description: With the bitcoin price above max pain and heavy positioning at $75K, traders face a potential squeeze or pullback into "max pain" expiry.

item.title: A $300 million borrowing spike on Aave signals liquidity crunch after KelpDAO exploit
item.description: The aftershocks of the Saturday's KelpDAO hack are spreading through stablecoin markets in ways that were not immediately obvious.

item.title: Crypto-backed loans are now live in the UK. Start borrowing USDC against BTC, ETH and cbETH. Unlocking liquidity without having to sell your crypto. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFA3cHVaUUc4eTFSZzlUNjFLX1ZZNTV5SzZPcWw5S3E3QUMzR1RtRFNfUEZwbmFQT2dBWWkzRUtuRDlrRWVMWGlMRkRBeDF1anZBbmZ4ZjhyODZlQlp3dlJlMg?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto-backed loans are now live in …

item.title: BIS warns dollar stablecoins could strain banks and policy
item.description: BIS general manager Pablo Hernández de Cos said US dollar stablecoins may pose risks to financial stability and urges stronger global coordination on regulation.

item.title: Meet the AI running a blockchain CEO's life - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWkFVX3lxTE1OS2JlV1d2Vk9Wd0NBRjQ3VThCM3pJc3htSmxFMzBWTm41cWx6QzI3aG5iWXJadEdWSW1WOWNKY19MX1RHUjl0amJPVjZ1ZVNYQnZHY3VBRkhlZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Meet the AI running a blockchain CEO's life<…

item.title: Institutional flows into major crypto assets are still building. Last week, BTC ETFs recorded $996M in net inflows, marking 3 straight weeks of inflows, with BlackRock’s IBIT leading at $906M. ETH ETFs added $276M on the week, led by Fidelity’s FETH with $12 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1zUDI0cWstUVN3WVI1bWhFbkJ3OVlFYUdBN1FIdE1KdThfbzJSZUVISm41em1aQ1dzZ01zZlA2Mm1xa0tIelEydFlBRm9BRDZpRmtVNTZkQmdpbEJuZ29qVUNFcmhiY0U?oc=5" target="_blank">Institutional flows into ma…

item.title: Saylor teases 'bigger' BTC buy days after floating semi-monthly dividends
item.description: Strategy’s Michael Saylor posted “Think Even Bigger” on Sunday, coming just a week after it disclosed $1 billion of Bitcoin buying.

item.title: Coinbase is testing AI agents that show up on Slack and email
item.description: Brian Armstrong has now predicted that AI agents will not only transact onchain more than humans but will outnumber employees at his company very soon.

item.title: Cloud hosting firm Vercel confirms ‘limited’ hack of user info
item.description: Vercel has confirmed it was compromised after a member of a hacking forum put the company’s information up for sale for $2 million.

item.title: The quantum gap: Why Bitcoin and Ethereum are taking different paths on security
item.description: Why Bitcoin and Ethereum are taking different paths to address future cryptographic risks and long-term blockchain security.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana slide, oil jumps on renewed U.S.-Iran war risks
item.description: Bitcoin traded at $74,335 after Iran reimposed controls on the Strait of Hormuz over the weekend, with the modest 1.6% pullback standing out against a 5.7% jump in Brent and a 1.2% drop in European equity futures.

item.title: Polymarket in talks to raise $400M at a $15B valuation: Report
item.description: Polymarket’s potential $15 billion valuation would still put it below the $22 billion valuation of competitor platform Kalshi in its latest funding round.

item.title: MSTR closed on Friday at $166 per share If Bitcoin closes the year at $162K (28.5% higher than previous ATH), Assuming ZERO additional BTC Accumulation $MSTR will have an Earnings Per Share of $166, EQUAL to the current stock price as of Friday's clo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBYQkxLQjBFc2FvU0p1SlFfeS1zbFNwUk9wZWZUdThKVkp4LXVjSnJiMkhDeU1NR1VpOFJkVDI1MmRBbTNiRDBKd01zMzBpRVhhN0tTd3RVQ21aNnRvcXViSA?oc=5" target="_blank">MSTR closed on Friday at $166 per sh…

item.title: LayerZero blames Kelp's setup for $290 million exploit, attributes it to North Korea's Lazarus
item.description: LayerZero said the attackers compromised two RPC nodes the company's verifier relied on and DDoS'd the rest, with the attack working only because Kelp had ignored multi-verifier recommendations.

item.title: Hackers impersonated eth.limo team to hijack its domain: Post-mortem
item.description: EasyDNS CEO Mark Jeftovic said the social engineering attack was highly sophisticated and the company is conducting further investigation to determine how the breach occurred.

item.title: The $13 billion DeFi wipeout in two days, and it started with KelpDAO attack
item.description: Multiple lending and yield protocols are posting double-digit percentage declines in TVL, though token prices are seeing a limited decline.

item.title: LayerZero: KelpDAO Loses ~$290M in Exploit, Attributed to DPRK’s Lazarus Group LayerZero reported that on April 18, 2026, KelpDAO suffered an exploit resulting in losses of approximately $290M, preliminarily attributed to DPRK’s Lazarus Group (TraderTr - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin erases weekend gains as US-Iran ceasefire faces pressure
item.description: Bitcoin briefly crashed below $74,000 on Sunday as Iran threatened retaliation for a US military seizure of an Iranian cargo ship.

item.title: Aave's TVL tanks $8B a day after $293M Kelp DAO hack
item.description: The Aave token fell nearly 20% to $89.5 in just over 24 hours as users withdrew billions of dollars from the lending protocol.

item.title: 🔥 NEW: US-based spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds recorded nearly $1 billion in net inflows over the past week and other news. Hodler's Digest via Cointelegraph Magazine - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9pS091OS1peWVpWk9LN0lCSGVYMnhKUHZxX2ZmbnhCN0RmMGFYZzc5aWtLTENyZUh4emxqektvdGllQzJqcFd2enZQNE5SSjJ2UGtYQ2k0RU45TW9rM2JnV2dzeHU?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NEW: US-based spot Bitcoin e…

item.title: Hack at Vercel sends crypto developers scrambling to lock down API keys
item.description: Breach tied to compromised AI tool may have exposed credentials used by app frontends, the user-facing layer that connects web3 wallets and trading interfaces to backend services.

item.title: RaveDAO-linked addresses sell approximately 23 million RAVE triggering a roughly 35 percent short-term price drop According to Arkham, a blockchain analytics platform, addresses linked to RaveDAO transferred 10 million RAVE (approximately $10.57 milli - x.com

item.title: A perfectly balanced day looks like: 8 hours of sending crypto without panic. 8 hours of nobody seeing your balance. 8 hours of asking yourself why this wasn't always the standard. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE04MUJVcHZ1SGJEZFdNOEMtYWdCMlV3NUpack50bVpJdnlURjRhcjdyYnRrOU00ckNnbnBUdmRkVUljMWdlUTZJTHRkVklYdGJQVHJOa0VzZzJwNVpVb0l0S3F0ck5DT2M?oc=5" target="_blank">A perfectly balanced day lo…

item.title: The $292 million Kelp exploit: how it happened, and what it means for DeFi
item.description: 2026 is shaping up to be DeFi's "worst year in terms of hacks," Ledger's CTO said, as the Kelp exploit shows how a single point of failure can cascade across systems.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $74,000 after Iran rejects second round of peace talks with the US. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5jSDNJLW50NzN2Rjh3SGI0YUtxZERlQ0ZIV1h2dU9reUdvV1UwYjh5NmZRVXFDMENNbXFqdEQydFo1bk9wMXlMSmdyMVcteFYwdkd2cUc5WDVhQkZNMHYyam13?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $74,0…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Stablecoins not a threat to banks in near term: Moody's analyst
item.description: A prohibition on yield-bearing stablecoins and robust payments infrastructure in the US means stablecoins will not eat into banks' market share.

item.title: Update on rsETH incident: According to our analysis, rsETH on Ethereum mainnet is fully backed. Out of an abundance of caution, rsETH remains frozen across Aave V3 and V4 and exposure to the incident is capped. WETH reserves also remain frozen across - x.com

item.title: Kelp DAO Exploit Sparks Aave Liquidity Crunch, $6.2 Billion Withdrawal Panic
item.description: After attackers drained $291 million in crypto from Kelp DAO-linked infrastructure, DeFi users struggled on Aave to withdraw funds.

item.title: 2024 BTC cycle 'dramatically' underperforming previous halvings: Analyst
item.description: Volatility and upside have been declining with each Bitcoin halving cycle, but the new dynamics may not be permanent, according to Galaxy's Alex Thorn.

item.title: Previewing Consensus' Policy Summit: State of Crypto
item.description: Every year policy discussions get more important, and this year's even more so.

item.title: Web3 VCs have a differentiation problem
item.description: When every fund claims the same great networks and strong relationships, nobody wins. Bauer, Co-Founder of TBV, offers a more rigorous framework for emerging managers to build a unique value proposition.

item.title: ELON MUSK: “Bitcoin is based on energy… it is impossible to fake energy.” "You can issue fake fiat currency… but it is impossible to fake energy." “Bitcoin is a GOOD thing.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFA3czZmWVRBQkVxRnNnWVd4bmIyR05ybHMtNGdpdTd4OGozWll6M2FlNDJkV1ZGM2tBSm5Xc3BpSmZrNF91QTdsZGVFVnJ2TWZUaDJBRUJxN0hTSVMwWHN4R3FB?oc=5" target="_blank">ELON MUSK: “Bitcoin is based on en…

item.title: 'DeFi is dead': crypto community scrambles after this year's biggest hack exposes contagion risk
item.description: Developers and traders warn of structural risks as a cross-chain exploit spreads fear and prompts billions to flee DeFi platforms.

item.title: ‼️💰 A compromised crypto custody account holding 9.22998 BTC is being sold on a popular cybercrime forum, with the threat actor claiming credentials were harvested from a corporate email inbox accessed during a separate company breach. ⠀ ‣ Threat Ac - x.com

item.title: The 10 Public Companies With the Biggest Bitcoin Portfolios
item.description: Companies like Strategy, Twenty One, and Metaplanet hold billions of dollars' worth of Bitcoin. These are the biggest publicly traded whales.
